headline: PPL Electric Utilities confirms continued support for rate case settlement following PUC approval
summary: PPL Electric Utilities is pleased to report that, following the Pennsylvania Public Utility Commission's approval of its distribution rate case settlement with a minor modification, all parties to the joint settlement have reaffirmed their support and do not intend to withdraw.

raw.headline: PPL Electric Utilities confirms continued support for rate case settlement following PUC approval
raw.summary: PPL Electric Utilities is pleased to report that, following the Pennsylvania Public Utility Commission's approval of its distribution rate case settlement with a minor modification, all parties to the joint settlement have reaffirmed their support and do not intend to withdraw.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on PPL, Lowers Price Target to $37
summary: Mizuho  analyst Anthony Crowdell   maintains PPL (NYSE:PPL) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $38 to $37.

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Outperform on PPL, Lowers Price Target to $39
summary: BMO Capital  analyst James Thalacker   maintains PPL (NYSE:PPL) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $40 to $39.
